summary: Decent audience recording captures a solid 1991 summer‑tour show with standout “Music Never Stopped” and strong renditions of Uncle John’s Band and Estimated Prophet.
review: The two fans agree the performance is a good example of the hot 1991 summer tour, highlighting an inspired “Music Never Stopped” that surprised even a longtime skeptic. The recording is an audience tape – acceptable but not pristine – yet it preserves the energy of the night well enough to make the download worthwhile.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer gives a perfect rating for the performance while the other rates it modestly and notes only an okay audience recording; overall the show is praised, recording is acceptable.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the tape as “ok” – clear enough to enjoy but lacking the polish of a soundboard source; no major drop‑outs or distortion were reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A solid summer‑tour set that builds to a memorable “Music Never Stopped” moment; overall pacing is praised as strong.
